nasb.text: then his father and mother shall seize him, and bring him out to the elders of his city at the gateway of his hometown.

esv.text: then his father and his mother shall take hold of him and bring him out to the elders of his city at the gate of the place where he lives,

cnv.text: 他的父母就要捉住他，把他帶到當地的城門，去見本城的長老，

ccb.text: 他父母要抓住他，把他带到城门口去见本城的长老，对他们说，
